response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js, along with deep expertise in scalable architectures, databases, and cloud services (AWS, Kubernetes). His background in energy/environmental projects (GISCollective) aligns with the renewable energy domain, though his recent roles lean toward AI/agent infrastructure rather than the specified tech stack. His pragmatic approach and strong collaboration skills are evident.
strengths: Proven fullstack expertise with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple roles
Strong background in scalable systems, databases (MongoDB, SQL), and cloud platforms (AWS, Kubernetes)
Experience in energy/environmental tech (GISCollective) and renovation workflows
concerns: Overqualified for entry-level role (Senior/Staff titles suggest higher seniority expectations)
Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL and Nest.js (required skills)
Recent work focuses on AI-agent infrastructure rather than the specified tech stack
